name: mdx-components
description: Auto-discovering MDX component mapper - automatically uses all installed DocsUI components
whenToUse: Use as the central MDX component map for your docs site. Import and register all DocsUI components here.
whenNotToUse: Do not import this file directly in MDX — it is a configuration file for your MDX renderer.
example:
// mdx-components.tsx
export const components = { Callout, Steps, Reveal, ... }
